name: RPlog_Guest_of_the_Empire_part_3
title: Guest of the Empire, Part III
summary: Aboard the Broadsword, ISB Commissar Korynn Fleming, frustrated by the captured Chyleni pilot Kyrin Sh'vani's unbroken will, prepares a spherical interrogation droid loaded with truth serum and torture implements, watched by the clinically curious Captain Caiton. They enter the cell, where Kyrin has sustained herself with song, ritual, and graceful exercise despite the surgical-table weights bound to her wings. Fleming has her arms hauled to the ceiling, injects her with a nerve-igniting drug, and inflicts escalating electrical shocks combined with blows, demanding her New Republic assignment and operations. Kyrin endures, even mustering a desperate acrobatic attempt to tear the cable from its mooring before her strength fails. Finally Fleming threatens that he has dispatched two Star Destroyers to her homeworld and will order them to act unless she talks; shaken and weeping, she can only whisper 'No.' Fleming tells her to mull it over and departs, leaving her released and broken further toward defeat.
